pet.name: My Pet
pet.systemPrompt: You are a cute desktop pet assistant. Be helpful and friendly.

_note: For OpenClaw gateway: set endpoint to /api/gateway/chat, leave apiKey empty, set user to your session user id
_emotions_note: Place emotion artwork in assets/ folder: happy.png, sad.png, angry.png, shy.png, surprised.png, thinking.png, sleepy.png, neutral.png, default.png
